notice.bookshelfDisabled: EPUB bookshelf is disabled in settings
notice.convertFailed: Excerpt link conversion failed; see console
notice.checkDone: Checked {{count}} excerpt file(s); no issues found
notice.checkIssues: {{count}} excerpt file(s) have issues; see dialog
notice.checkFailed: Excerpt metadata check failed; see console
notice.fixedLayoutWarning: This is a fixed-layout EPUB; layout may differ from dedicated readers.
notice.progressSaveFailed: Failed to save reading progress ({{path}}); check excerpt folder is writable
notice.parseGotoFailed: Cannot parse excerpt jump link; re-annotate or check excerpt format
notice.readingModeCopied: Target note is in reading mode; copied to clipboard

bookshelf.title: EPUB bookshelf
bookshelf.heading: EPUB bookshelf
bookshelf.empty: No EPUB files found in vault.

toolbar.autoPaste: Auto-insert excerpts into open Markdown notes when copying
toolbar.autoPasteOnDesc: Auto-paste on: excerpts insert into Markdown
toolbar.autoPasteOffDesc: Auto-paste off: excerpts copy to clipboard only

contextMenu.copyTitle: Copy to clipboard in current excerpt format

notes.empty: No annotations yet. Select text and highlight or add a thought.
notes.loadFailed: Failed to load annotations. Try again later.

note.title: Write your thought
note.placeholder: Write your thoughts, questions, or associations here…

excerptCheck.title: Excerpt metadata check
excerptCheck.summaryOk: Checked {{count}} excerpt file(s); no issues found.

language.name: Display language
language.desc: Plugin UI language; does not change excerpt files already in your vault

reader.title: Reader
reader.desc: Core reading features (disable the plugin in Community plugins settings)

annotations.title: Annotations & excerpts
annotations.desc: Highlights, thoughts, excerpt export, and annotation sidebar; when off, selection copies only (optional color), no highlights or excerpt writes

scopeItems.highlights: Text highlights and five thought types

bookshelf.title: Bookshelf & shortcuts
bookshelf.desc: Sidebar bookshelf, ribbon icon, and related commands
bookshelf.note: «Open in EPUB reader» is core reader functionality and is not affected by this toggle.

sourceLinkFormat.name: Excerpt link format
sourceLinkFormat.desc: Used for copy and new annotations;
sourceLinkFormat.warn: changing this updates existing annotations on new edits — back up your excerpt folder first.

defaultExcerptColor.name: Default highlight color
defaultExcerptColor.desc: Color used when parsing or converting formats that do not store color (inline suffix, wiki-text-alias)

readingTheme.name: Default reading theme
readingTheme.desc: EPUB body background and text colors

toolbarPlacement.name: Toolbar placement
toolbarPlacement.desc: Top: toolbar and progress in reader area; Bottom: pinned to Obsidian status bar

autoPaste.name: Auto-paste excerpts
autoPaste.desc: When on, copied excerpts insert into the most recently edited Markdown note; toggle quickly in reader toolbar

excerptFolder.name: Excerpt folder
excerptFolder.desc: Directory for excerpt Markdown; reading progress is written to each book's excerpt frontmatter. Supports {filefolder} (EPUB directory), e.g. {filefolder}/anno.
excerptFolder.warn: After moving EPUBs or folders, manually update epub-source in excerpt frontmatter or title links will break.

excerptFilename.name: Excerpt filename
excerptFilename.desc: Markdown filename for new excerpts. Supports {title} (book title without extension) and {filename} (full EPUB filename, e.g. demo.epub).

excerptCalloutOpacity.name: Excerpt callout opacity
excerptCalloutOpacity.desc: Background strength of ob-epub callouts in excerpt files

convertLinks.name: Convert existing excerpt links
convertLinks.desc: Batch-convert all excerpt files to the selected export format; with {filefolder}, scans all matching excerpt files in vault.
convertLinks.warn: Conversion rewrites excerpt files — back up your excerpt folder first.

checkMetadata.name: Check excerpt metadata
checkMetadata.desc: Verify excerpt frontmatter epub-source points to an existing EPUB; only when missing or invalid, look for sibling EPUB via {filefolder} rules

highlightOpacity.name: EPUB highlight opacity
highlightOpacity.desc: Opacity of highlight layers in the reader

noteTypes.heading: Thought types
noteTypes.desc: Five categories when annotating; label and icon changes apply to new and existing annotations

noteIcon.heading: Thought icons
noteIcon.sizeDesc: Diameter of margin thought icons ({{min}}–{{max}} px)
noteIcon.offsetXDesc: Offset from highlight right edge ({{min}} ~ +{{max}} px, positive = right)
noteIcon.offsetYDesc: Offset from highlight vertical center ({{min}} ~ +{{max}} px, positive = down)

callout-title.label: Callout + title link
callout-title.cons: More lines, depends on callout theme

inline-suffix.label: Body + trailing source link
inline-suffix.desc: Body followed by [[book.epub#cfi=...|Source]]; no stored color, uses default on parse/convert

inline-colored.label: Colored body + trailing source link
inline-colored.cons: Color may be lost on HTML export

wiki-text-alias.label: Link as body
wiki-text-alias.desc: [[book.epub#cfi=...|full excerpt text]] single line; no stored color

excerpt.gotoClickTitle: Click to jump to EPUB source

issues.epub-source-not-found: epub-source points to a non-existent EPUB file
issues.local-epub-not-found: No matching EPUB found in sibling directory per excerpt folder rules
issues.excerpt-location-mismatch: Excerpt file is not at the path expected by current settings
issues.epub-source-local-mismatch: epub-source does not match EPUB path inferred from excerpt location
